changes.description: Added constriction_surface computation to deriveStructuralEnrichment() — Tarjan articulation point detection, through-flow scoring, bridge multiplier. Primary path from import edges, fallback from degree-ratio proxy.

Added EXECUTION_CONSTRICTION to CONDITION_VOCABULARY and CONDITION_INTERVENTIONS. Added roleMap entry. Added ruleExecutionConstriction() function. Extended synthesize() and synthesizeTeaser() primitives arrays.
Added mapEC() function, mapCondition switch case, COGNITION_SLICE_VOCABULARY entry, MAP_CONDITION_KEYS extension.
Added EXECUTION_CONSTRICTION to CONDITION_NODES. Updated upstream refs on OP_BOTTLENECK (defining), COORD_FRAG (conditional), DEP_AMP (conditional). Updated §4 RULE_NODES upstream.
Added EXECUTION_CONSTRICTION to SECTION_4_RULES and PROJECTION_DISPOSITION_TABLE.
Added EXECUTION_CONSTRICTION to COORDINATION_SATURATION surface in SURFACE_CONDITION_MAP.
